description_long: This is an adult male figure lying flat on his back with arms relaxed at his sides and legs extended straight. He is dressed in a short-sleeved, loose-fitting shirt and a pair of fitted jeans, both of which appear casual and suitable for everyday urban environments. The figure's feet are bare, and his hands are open with fingers slightly curled. His hair is short and neatly styled, and his facial features are neutral and relaxed. The overall build is average, with realistic body proportions and subtle anatomical details visible in the limbs and torso. The clothing drapes naturally, and the skin texture is smooth, with no visible accessories or carried items.
description: An adult male figure in casual clothing, lying flat with arms at his sides and bare feet, featuring short hair and realistic proportions.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the back of the head, shoulders, and upper torso, with arms and legs fully extended and feet visible at the far end.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, arm, and the full length of the body from head to toes.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view focusing on the soles of the feet, the backs of the legs, and the underside of the arms, with the head at the far end.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, including the side of the face, torso, arm, and the full length of the body.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt and fitted jeans
attribute_posture: lying flat on back with arms at sides
